rhythm_trace.name: resting_baseline
rhythm_trace.description: Resting cardiac rhythm before intervention — fixed point, no cyclical entrainment, no broadcasting.

rhythm_trace.name: entrained_cycle
rhythm_trace.description: Subject in HeartMath-style positive-emotion focus; ECG-brain cross-coherence emerges (Oschman 2015 p.2 / oschman_2015_rein_coherence). Cyclical 8-phase entrainment, correlated across heart-brain pair.

rhythm_trace.name: master_oscillator_broadcast
rhythm_trace.description: Subject at sustained coherent radiating state — heart as master electrical oscillator broadcasting coherent frequencies system-wide (Oschman 2015 p.2 / oschman_2015_master_oscillator). 24-cycle Cosmos orbit.

source_attribution: Oschman & Oschman 2015 (J Vortex Sci Technol 2:121) + Edwards 2018 (J Psych Africa 28:5) + HeartMath Institute; mapping by Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-20. Grounds Phase 4.8 item 5.

witnesses.note: Cosmos broadcasting-state label grounded in the 'master electrical oscillator radiating coherent frequencies' quote.
Satellite entrained-state label grounded in ECG/brain cross-coherence under positive-emotion attention.
Two-boundary-crossing symmetry per Theorem NT matches Oschman's antenna transmit/receive reciprocity.
HeartMath literature maps population-scale coherence patterns — consistent with orbit-class classification as primary operational surface.
